chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 700 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter 1. For orders on MA No.764/2023 (U/A) 2. For hearing of MA No.5570/2022 06.02.2023 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Asif Kolachi, Advocate for the applicant/surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Through instant application, the applicant/surety, namely, Ghulam Rasool S/o Alam Khan Pitafi, seeks return of his surety document furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court. It appears from the record that accused, namely, Jam Jalees-ul- Hassan S/o Jam Abdul Majeed Kalar was granted protective bail by this Court vide order dated 19.11.2020, whereas, the applicant had stood surety on behalf of the said accused by depositing original Solvency Certificate No.104 dated 17.11.2020, issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Pano Akil. After the grant of protective bail, the accused had surrendered before the concerned trial Court and ultimately he has been acquitted vide judgment dated 25.08.2022, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/Gender Based Violence Court, Sukkur in Sessions Case No.42 of 2020 (Re: The State v. Jaleel & others), arisen out of Crime No.134 of 2019, registered at Police Station Rohri under Sections 365-B, 452, 34, P.P.C. In this regard, the applicant has placed on record certified true copy of aforesaid judgment. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional P.G, present in Court in some other matters, records his no objection for return of the surety document. The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 09.12.2022.

Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional P.G, present in Court in some other matters, records his no objection for return of the surety document. The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 09.12.2022. In view of above, the listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document as furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court to the applicant/surety after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
